csp.quant_note: The $355 CSP May 29 leads all CSP candidates at 30.07% AROC with 29 DTE — highest annualized yield in the scan. At -0.29 delta the strike sits ~4.8% OTM from $372.79, within optimal Theta decay range. Outperforms the May 29 $350 and Jun 5 $350 equivalents by 500bps+ annualized while maintaining a solid OTM cushion.

cc.quant_note: The $405 CC May 29 tops the CC group at 24.48% AROC with 29 DTE. Strike sits ~$32 OTM (~8.6% above $372.79), providing solid upside buffer while collecting premium at peak Theta decay velocity. Outperforms the Jun 5 and lower-strike May 29 alternatives on annualized yield.
